heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1524 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1999—Subsec. (a). substituted “2000 through 2002” for “1998 and 1999”.Pub. L. 106–1041997—Subsec. (a). and amended subsec. children.label: a
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each of fiscal years 2000 through 2002 such sums as may be necessary to carry out this subchapter.

children.label: b
children.text: The authority to enter into contracts under this subchapter shall be effective for any fiscal year only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriation Acts.
